title: gapmind-nf pipeline parameters
description: Portable, containerized GapMind analysis (amino-acid biosynthesis + carbon catabolism).

input.description: Samplesheet CSV with a header and columns 'faa' (path to a protein FASTA) and optional 'sample' (a unique name).

outdir.description: Output directory (merged tables, presence matrices, plots, pipeline_info).

sets.description: Space-separated pathway sets to run ('aa', 'carbon', or both).

batch_size.description: Genomes per task. Larger amortizes startup; affects speed, not the calls.

search_tool.description: Similarity search tool used in the analysis.

knownsim.description: Run the amino-acid known-gap comparison (orgsVsMarkers; requires usearch).

keep_cand.description: Keep the large per-candidate table (*.sum.cand) in the merged output.

db_dir.description: Reuse an existing database directory (with path.<set>/) instead of downloading.

prebuilt_base.description: Base URL for the prebuilt curated + steps databases.

singularity_image.description: Path to the Singularity/Apptainer .sif image (-profile singularity/apptainer).
